name: Rust
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y protobuf-compiler default-jre curl && curl -sSL https://github.com/fullstorydev/grpcurl/releases/download/v1.9.1/grpcurl_1.9.1_linux_arm64.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin && npm install -g @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli && cargo install diesel_cli cargo-tarpaulin just cargo-edit
